title: gentiana quadrifaria var. zeylanica
intro: Gentiana quadrifaria var. zeylanica, also known as Zeylanica gentian, is a variant of the Gentiana quadrifaria plant, belonging to the Gentianaceae family. It is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Sri Lanka, traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains gentiopicroside, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Gentiana quadrifaria var. zeylanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
